title: Fantasia 2012
body:
Multi-arts party event managed and co-produced by Colin Ward, part of the recurring Fantasia series. Mentioned in Westword's "Another 100 Colorado Creatives: Colin Ward" alongside Fantasia 2014 as examples of Colin's curation work. Co-produced with Stephan Herrera and others from the Rhinoceropolis underground installation arts and music performance scene.

**Note on series origins:** Fantasia 2012 was previously the earliest documented Fantasia event in the vault, but archive evidence now confirms the series predates it significantly. A track titled "run it run it fantasia mixx" appears on the alphabets monthly album *NOV09* (November 29, 2009), and "fantasia2011.mp3" appears on *APRIL CO-EDS 2011* (May 2011). Fantasia as a concept and named event appears to have begun by 2009. See [[events/fantasia-2011]] for the earliest confirmed dated event.

## Sources
- [Westword — Another 100 Colorado Creatives: Colin Ward](https://www.westword.com/arts/another-100-colorado-creatives-colin-ward-6280465)
